name: Create Grassland Food Web Flipchart
description: Create a 3-page science lesson flipchart about a grassland ecosystem food web. The flipchart must include an introductory page titled 'Grassland Food Web' with definitions for 'Producer', 'Consumer', and 'Decomposer'; a food web diagram page featuring at least 6 organisms (Grass, Grasshopper, Frog, Snake, Hawk, and Fungi) connected by at least 5 directional energy flow arrows; and an 'Energy Pyramid' page consisting of at least 3 stacked shapes labeled 'Producers', 'Primary Consumers', and 'Secondary Consumers'. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/grassland_food_web.flipchart.
